2245510.name: Castle Of Plague
2245510.description:
Fight against different enemis in various chapter. Improve your charater's level and determine your best strategy with the money you earn by killing enemies. Will you use your money for a better weapon, or will you spend it for magic potions? Be ready and prepared for the boss with right strategy and the right use of resources!

>An exciting action experience with an avarage playtime of 2 hours!
>Uninterrupted excitement with different chapters, different enemies and bossess, each of them created to provide and exciting experience!
>Enhance your game experiences and variety by choosing 4 different weapons and 2 different potions according to your strategy with the money you earn!
>Improve the powers and effects of the weapon and potions you use by increasing your character level and experience a more efficient war experience!
